The '''Second Fleet''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] was one of the four Alliance fleets during the latter portion of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong Invasion]]. It was formed out of the [[New Republic Second Fleet|New Republic Second Battle Group]].

==History==
Under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], the fleet was active in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], liberating [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Battle of Corulag (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Corulag]]. The Second Fleet also participated in the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]]. With the establishment of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]] following the war, several of the Second Fleet's more veteran ships and crews were attached to the new fleet, including the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']].

In the years following the end of the Vong war, the Second Fleet made an annual run up and down the route of the Vong invasion path, searching for any holdouts.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], a task force of the Second Fleet under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]] participated in an [[Operation Roundabout|show of force]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. With the failure of the operation, Klauskin chose to [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|attack]] and [[Tralus Ground Occupation Forces|occupy]] the Corellian world of [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] to save face, opening the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. When Klauskin was deemed crazy and replaced, Admiral [[Tarla Limpan]] took over his position as leader of the Second Fleet.<ref name="Betrayal" />

The Second Fleet was destroyed in an [[Battle of the rendezvous point|ambush]] at the Corellian system by a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] blast from the reactivated [[Centerpoint Station]], destroying every ship in the fleet and killing all hands.<ref name="Fury" />
